'''Disim''' was a planet in the [[Epidimi system/Legends|Epidimi system]], discovered [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], which crossbred its native avians with those of [[Iri]], resulting in the [[Tarong]]s, whom drove their mother species on both worlds extinct.
